attributes.name: Adult Beginner 1 - Thursday 5:45pm
attributes.description: Please note: This class shares ice with the youth learn to skate session at the same time. The first 30 minute are generally a practice/warm-up while the second 30 minutes are the class time. First week of classes will begin from 5:45pm without the practice/warm-up. Group instruction includes a 30 minute class and 30 minute supervised practice. Beginner 1 (Pre-Alpha equivalent) & Adult Beginner 1 Curriculum: 1. Two foot glide 2. One-foot glide/ right foot/ left foot 3. Forward Swizzle 4. Backward Wiggle 5. Backward Swizzle 6. Forward Pumps
